content:
✨ hermes-webui | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a convenient and accessible web-based interface for interacting with the Hermes Agent, mirroring its full command-line functionality.
✨ Key Features: • Web-based interface for Hermes Agent • Full CLI parity • Three-panel layout (sidebar, chat, workspace) • Composer footer for controls • Circular context ring for token usage
📖 Summary: Hermes WebUI provides a lightweight, dark-themed web interface for the Hermes Agent, offering full parity with its CLI experience. It allows users to interact with the autonomous agent through a browser, managing sessions, workspaces, and configurations with a user-friendly three-panel layout.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
